heroHeadline: Russia Launches 442-Drone Barrage; Captures Kovsharovka; Bans Gasoline Exports After Refinery Strikes
heroSubtitle: 442 Russian drones overnight kill 4 across Ukraine; Russia captures Kovsharovka (pop. 17,960) in Kharkiv Oblast with 800 Ukrainian soldiers reportedly encircled; Ukraine strikes Ust-Luga port for 4th consecutive night; Russia bans gasoline exports April 1; Mediazona/BBC confirm 206,202 Russian KIA by name; 236 combat engagements recorded March 29
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
